currentTask.context: Designing Game 24: Dead Reckoning - celestial navigation, star bearing lines, terrain map, 5 rounds

gameQueue.title: Dead Reckoning
gameQueue.concept: Navigate a night cattle drive using stars: tap two constellation stars to draw bearing lines, find their intersection on the terrain map, and plot your route to the ranch before clouds close in. First navigation/celestial puzzle mechanic in the series.
gameQueue.raisesBarOn: First map-based gameplay, first celestial navigation mechanic, most geometric/spatial reasoning in series

gameQueue.title: Fence Line
gameQueue.concept: Rebuild a storm-damaged fence before the cattle scatter: place fence posts and rails by tapping grid cells in the right order while wind gusts push you off balance and time runs out. First construction mechanic in series.
gameQueue.raisesBarOn: First construction/placement mechanic, first real-time sequencing under environmental pressure

gameQueue.title: Dust Storm
gameQueue.concept: Guide a stagecoach through a blinding dust storm: visibility shrinks to a lantern cone, tap to swerve around unseen boulders and ravines revealed only as the coach approaches. First visibility/fog-of-war mechanic in series.
gameQueue.raisesBarOn: First dynamic visibility system, first reactive obstacle reveal, highest moment-to-moment tension in series

runLog.summary: Built Game 06: Cattle Drive (cattle-drive.html). Flocking AI, wolf predators, 13 tests pass.
Built Game 07: Tin Star Showdown (tin-star-showdown.html). Quick-draw duel, best-of-3, AI difficulty scaling, 13 tests pass.
Built Game 08: Dust Devil (dust-devil.html). 2-axis physics tumbleweed, tap-to-gust canyon navigation, 14 tests pass.
Built Game 09: Wanted Poster. Memory/deduction face-ID mechanic, procedural face system, 15 tests pass.
Built Game 10: Gold Rush - lantern-lit cave mining, BFS pathfinding, triple resource management, 16 tests pass.
Built Game 11: Boot Hill Bluff - turn-based bluffing duel with AI tell system, narrative choices, chip betting. 18 tests pass.
Built Game 12: Stampede - first-person buffalo stampede, 3-lane dodge, signal herd mechanic. 23 tests pass.
Built Game 13: Snake Oil - frontier medicine wagon, match ingredients to ailments, NPC dialogue, 30 tests pass.
Built Game 14: Midnight Rodeo - bareback bull-riding, directional tap-match, crowd energy multiplier, 31 tests pass.
Fixed Midnight Rodeo: taps now register at any time during play, not just the 0.7s telegraph window.
Built Game 15: Prairie Fire - wildfire cellular automaton, 18x26 grid, wind-direction spread, firebreak+water placement, 35 tests pass.
Built Game 16: Moonshine Run - stealth + 3-gauge resource management, revenuer lantern cone detection, 40 tests pass.
Built Game 17: Rope Trick - oscillating aim cursor, parabolic arc, wind drift, 5 rounds, 40 tests pass.
Built Game 18: Dead Man's Hand - Texas Hold'em vs 3 AI outlaws with bluffing tells, full hand evaluator, 44 tests pass.
Built Game 19: Canyon Crossfire - cover-based shooter, 3 outlaws with staggered reload cycles, peek/fire/retreat, 36 tests pass.
Built Game 20: Trail Boss - top-down wagon escort, 3 draining resources, 5 biomes, ambush/supply/river events, 40 tests pass.
Built Game 21: Wanted: Dead or Alive - first-person investigation, 5 locations, confidence meter, accuse mechanic, 47 tests pass.
Built Game 22: Gallows Road - turn-based grid puzzle, 5 levels, guard patrol, crate push mechanic, 37 tests pass.
Built Game 23: Devil's Backbone - hold-to-balance wagon load, spring+damping physics, 5-stage mountain pass, 44 tests pass.
